mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consult_session (product_id, buyer_id, seller_id, buyer_last_read_time, seller_last_read_time, create_time) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, IFNULL(#{buyerLastReadTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), IFNULL(#{sellerLastReadTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), IFNULL(#{createTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.select: SELECT cs.id, cs.product_id, cs.buyer_id, cs.seller_id, cs.buyer_last_read_time, cs.seller_last_read_time, cs.create_time, p.title AS product_title, p.image AS product_image, p.price AS product_price, p.status AS product_status, p.trade_location AS trade_location, cm.content AS last_message, cm.create_time AS last_message_time FROM consult_session cs LEFT JOIN product p ON p.id = cs.product_id LEFT JOIN consult_message cm ON cm.id = ( SELECT id FROM consult_message WHERE session_id = cs.id ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE cs.buyer_id = #{userId} OR cs.seller_id = #{userId} ORDER BY COALESCE(cm.create_time, cs.create_time) DESC, cs.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE consult_session SET buyer_last_read_time = CASE WHEN buyer_id = #{userId} THEN #{readTime} ELSE buyer_last_read_time END, seller_last_read_time = CASE WHEN seller_id = #{userId} THEN #{readTime} ELSE seller_last_read_time END WHERE id = #{sessionId} AND (buyer_id = #{userId} OR seller_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM consult_session cs WHERE (cs.buyer_id = #{userId} OR cs.seller_id = #{userId}) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM consult_message cm WHERE cm.session_id = cs.id AND cm.sender_id != #{userId} AND cm.create_time > COALESCE( CASE WHEN cs.buyer_id = #{userId} THEN cs.buyer_last_read_time ELSE cs.seller_last_read_time END, '1970-01-01 00:00:00' ) )
